chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَنِيِّ وَ الْمَذْيِ يُصِيبَانِ الثَّوْبَ وَ الْجَسَدَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The semen and the seminal fluid both hit the clothes and the body

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا نَرَى فِي الْمَذْيِ وُضُوءاً وَ لَا غَسْلًا مَا أَصَابَ الثَّوْبَ مِنْهُ إِلَّا فِي الْمَاءِ الْأَكْبَرِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Aban, from Anbasa Bin Mus’ab who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘Weasws do not view an Ablution (Wudhu) to be regarding the seminal fluid, nor a washing in whatever hits the clothes from it, except regarding the great water (semen)’.
en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Aban from ‘Anbasah ibn Mus’ab who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Wudu’ is not necessary because of al-Madhiy (the pre-seminal fluid) nor is washing clothes which may have come in contact with it unless it is the major discharge of (semen).”’
